headline: Fair Isaac: An Ace In The Hole Overlooked By The Market
summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) stock rated Buy: SaaS pivot lifts ARR +33% as fears fade. Valuation analysis suggests a 24.6% margin of safety. See more details here.
